def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
    n = nums.length
    max_index = n - 1
    sieve = Array.new(max_index + 1, true)

    sum_b = 0
    nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
        if sieve[i]
            sum_a += num
        else
            sum_b += num
        end
    end
    (sum_a - sum_b).abs
end
```

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    max_index = n - 1
    sieve = Array.new(max_index + 1, true)
    sieve[0] = false
    sieve[1] = false
    (2..Math.sqrt(max_index)).each do |i|
        if sieve[i]
            (i*i..max_index).step(i) do |j|
                sieve[j] = false
            end
        end
    end
    sum_a = 0
    sum_b = 0
    nums.each_with_index do |num, i|
        if sieve[i]
            sum_a += num
        else
            sum_b += num
        end
    end
    (sum_a - sum_b).abs
end
